slots.root: flex flex-col gap-2 bg-base-200 border-[length:var(--bw)] border-base-300 rounded-lg p-5 min-h-30
slots.head: flex items-center justify-between gap-3
slots.label: font-mono text-ctl-2xs tracking-label uppercase text-base-content/62
slots.delta: self-start inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-pill px-2 py-0.5 bg-transparent border-[length:var(--bw)] font-body text-ctl-sm font-semibold
